reason: The item cleanly tests phase-specific hazard reasoning: the stem’s data enable rejecting an overbroad “greater in every respect” claim while supporting nuanced, phase-conditional evaluations and a mechanistic explanation. Decoys are largely engineering-plausible but a couple rely on broad absolute language (e.g., “in all phases,” “regardless of SOC”), which can make elimination somewhat heuristic rather than purely analytic. Overall it offers strong expert discrimination by penalizing unqualified generalization and rewarding boundary-aware interpretation of Su across phases.
